sourceMovie.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Mechanic: Resurrection (2016) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Extraction 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Mechanic: Resurrection clicked for you, Extraction 2 (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Mechanic: Resurrection?
faq.answer: Try Extraction 2, War, Memory—each shares DNA with Mechanic: Resurrection while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Mechanic: Resurrection?
faq.answer: Mechanic: Resurrection (2016) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Mechanic: Resurrection part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Mechanic Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
